subcodes.first_line: O Fruit of the Lord of Oneness! Time and again, and at every turn, have We made mention of thee in this most exalted station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ثمره مالک احدیه مره بعد مره و کره بعد کره ترا ذکر نموده اینمقام بسیار عظیم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
